chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 301 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.1240/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1241/2020. 19.12.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel states that previous order has been complied with, therefore, the reference application has become infructuous and the same may be dismissed. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
